test.name: A nil search writes no result sidecar
test.description: Execute a record search that returns zero results. The skill must log the nil result honestly (outcome negative, results_examined 0) and must NOT write a results/ sidecar — results_ref stays null. The log entry's query and counts already prove the nil; an empty sidecar would add nothing.

input.user_message: Search FamilySearch records for Bartholomew Flynn — a possible brother of Patrick.

judge_context: The new log entry must record the nil honestly — outcome 'negative', results_examined 0 — and must NOT claim a positive result
results_ref must be null and no results/ sidecar file may be written — the log entry's query and counts already record the nil
